name: Apple cider vinaigrette
intro: Whisk together this simple, tangy vinaigrette dressing in minutes to give your salads a flavor-packed punch. Nonalcoholic apple cider vinegar is available in health food stores and larger supermarkets.

ingredients.item: finely chopped fresh herbs, such as chives, tarragon, or parsley
salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: In a small bowl, whisk together the shallot, herbs, apple cider vinegar, salt, and Dijon mustard.
Slowly whisk in the extra-virgin olive oil, a few drops at a time, until the dressing is smooth and all the oil has been incorporated.
Season with black pepper and use immediately, or refrigerate in a tightly sealed container for up to 3 days.
